The Reaping (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,126,214Details
International Box Office $37,100,000
Worldwide Box Office $62,226,214
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,365,698
Total $20,365,698
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Katherine Morrissey, a former Christian missionary, lost her faith after the tragic deaths of her family. Now she applies her expertise to debunking religious phenomena. When a series of biblical plagues overrun a small town, Katherine arrives to prove that a supernatural force is not behind the occurrences, but soon finds that science cannot explain what is happening. Instead, she must regain her faith to combat the evil that waits in a Louisiana swamp.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,025,203 (39.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:40.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,603 opening theaters/2,603 max. theaters, 3.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $43,678,709

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 5th, 2007 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: October 16th, 2007 by Warner Home Video, released as Reaping, The
MPA Rating: R for violence, disturbing images and some sexuality
Running Time: 96 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Son or Daughter, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Human Sacrifice, Occult, Paranormal Investigation, Religious, Sex Crimes, Skeptic, Surprise Twist
Social setting: Satanism, Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Dark Castle Entertainment, Village Roadshow Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Katherine Morrissey, a former Christian missionary, lost her faith after the tragic deaths of her family. Now she applies her expertise to debunking religious phenomena. When a series of biblical plagues overrun a small town, Katherine arrives to prove that a supernatural force is not behind the occurrences, but soon finds that science cannot explain what is happening. Instead, she must regain her faith to combat the evil that waits in a Louisiana swamp.
